prompt: Analyze this codebase for architectural improvements

assertions.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a dotfiles/stow-based repo (not a typical application)
Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions (not just one angle)
Report includes a 'what's working well' section (not just problems)
Findings reference specific file paths as evidence, not just vague claims
Findings are ranked or prioritized in some way (severity, impact, or numbered)
At least 2 findings include a concrete suggestion or direction (not just 'improve this')
